summary: Read-only plan: #84603 remains the live canonical for the narrow #84583 cron announce delivery mirror race, but it is not merge-ready because the preflight artifact reports dirty mergeability, failing/stale full CI, and a current ClawSweeper proof blocker. #84583 should stay open and related to #84603 until that fix is merge-ready. #86491 is related but broader and should not be collapsed into #84603 because it also changes heartbeat/digest proactive delivery transcript mirrors. Closed linked refs are historical evidence only.
